Izabel has just presented to the board.
A year ago, she prepared everything by hand.
Izabel, before we close, can you give the board a sense of how far we have come this year?
Of course. Since January, we have expanded the team and reached two new markets in North America.
That is impressive. Have you broken even on the new product line yet?
Yes, we have. We broke even last quarter, and we have hit almost every benchmark you set.
Excellent. And the reporting? Have you automated it?
Not completely yet. We have improved it a lot, but I still prepare some numbers by hand.
Understood. You have made remarkable progress this year, Izabel.
Thank you. A year ago, I could not present in English. I have come a long way.
Since January, we have expanded the team and reached new markets.
So far, the results have been strong.
We have broken even, but we have not automated the reporting yet.
A year ago, everything ran on spreadsheets.
We have come a long way, but there is still work to do.

Hi Izabel, it's Tom from the board. I just wanted to say how impressed we have all been with the progress this year. When we first invested, the company was tiny and everything ran on spreadsheets. Since then, you have expanded the team, you have reached two new markets, and you have broken even on the new product line. You have not automated the reporting yet, and that is completely fine, because these things take time. Personally, I think you have grown the most of anyone on this call, especially in English. Keep it up, and we will talk on Thursday.

Good morning, everyone. This is Nina, with a short progress update before the call. Over the past year, the company has changed a great deal. Headcount has grown from twelve people to twenty, revenue has increased every quarter, and we have reached our main benchmark ahead of schedule. We have invested in new equipment, and we have started to scale up production in Valinhos. We have not solved everything: the reporting is still partly manual, and Izabel still prepares some numbers by hand. But overall, we have made strong progress this year. Izabel will share the full details on Thursday. Thank you, and talk soon.
